videos.headline: Cal completes upset of Auburn with game-sealing INT
videos.description: Auburn quarterback Payton Thorne throws an interception at the end of the game to California's Lu-Magia Hearns III to wrap up the Golden Bears' win.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cal completes upset of Auburn with game-sealing INT) 2024/09/07 ESHEET
